HTML:
| Sayfa Bulunamadi | { "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "BlogPosting", "headline": "", "url": "", "mainEntityOfPage": "", "description": "", "image": "", "publisher": { "@type": "Organization", "name": "" } } { "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "WebPage", "name": "", "url": "", "description": "" } { "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "Organization", "name": "", "url": "", "description": "" } { "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "WebSite", "name": "", "url": "", "description": "", "potentialAction": { "@type": "SearchAction", "target": "search?q={search_term_string}", "query-input": "required name=search_term_string" } } :root{--background:oklch(100% 0 0);--foreground:oklch(14.1% .005 285.823);--card:oklch(100% 0 0);--card-foreground:oklch(14.1% .005 285.823);--popover:oklch(100% 0 0);--popover-foreground:oklch(14.1% .005 285.823);--primary:oklch(21% .006 285.885);--primary-foreground:oklch(98.5% 0 0);--secondary:oklch(96.7% .001 286.375);--secondary-foreground:oklch(21% .006 285.885);--muted:oklch(96.7% .001 286.375);--muted-foreground:oklch(55.2% .016 285.938);--accent:oklch(96.7% .001 286.375);--accent-foreground:oklch(21% .006 285.885);--destructive:oklch(57.7% .245 27.325);--border:oklch(92% .004 286.32);--input:oklch(92% .004 286.32);--ring:oklch(70.5% .015 286.067);--chart-1:oklch(87.1% .006 286.286);--chart-2:oklch(55.2% .016 285.938);--chart-3:oklch(44.2% .017 285.786);--chart-4:oklch(37% .013 285.805);--chart-5:oklch(27.4% .006 286.033);--radius:1rem;--sidebar:oklch(98.5% 0 0);--sidebar-foreground:oklch(14.1% .005 285.823);--sidebar-primary:oklch(21% .006 285.885);--sidebar-primary-foreground:oklch(98.5% 0 0);--sidebar-accent:oklch(96.7% .001 286.375);--sidebar-accent-foreground:oklch(21% .006 285.885);--sidebar-border:oklch(92% .004 286.32);--sidebar-ring:oklch(70.5% .015 286.067)}.dark{--background:oklch(14.1% .005 285.823);--foreground:oklch(98.5% 0 0);--card:oklch(21% .006 285.885);--card-foreground:oklch(98.5% 0 0);--popover:oklch(21% .006 285.885);--popover-foreground:oklch(98.5% 0 0);--primary:oklch(92% .004 286.32);--primary-foreground:oklch(21% .006 285.885);--secondary:oklch(27.4% .006 286.033);--secondary-foreground:oklch(98.5% 0 0);--muted:oklch(27.4% .006 286.033);--muted-foreground:oklch(70.5% .015 286.067);--accent:oklch(27.4% .006 286.033);--accent-foreground:oklch(98.5% 0 0);--destructive:oklch(70.4% .191 22.216);--border:oklch(100% 0 0/.1);--input:oklch(100% 0 0/.15);--ring:oklch(55.2% .016 285.938);--chart-1:oklch(87.1% .006 286.286);--chart-2:oklch(55.2% .016 285.938);--chart-3:oklch(44.2% .017 285.786);--chart-4:oklch(37% .013 285.805);--chart-5:oklch(27.4% .006 286.033);--sidebar:oklch(21% .006 285.885);--sidebar-foreground:oklch(98.5% 0 0);--sidebar-primary:oklch(92% .004 286.32);--sidebar-primary-foreground:oklch(21% .006 285.885);--sidebar-accent:oklch(27.4% .006 286.033);--sidebar-accent-foreground:oklch(98.5% 0 0);--sidebar-border:oklch(100% 0 0/.1);--sidebar-ring:oklch(55.2% .016 285.938)}.sr-only{clip:rect(0,0,0,0);white-space:nowrap;border:0;width:1px;height:1px;margin:-1px;padding:0;position:absolute;overflow:hidden}.skip-link{z-index:60;color:#fff;background:#121216f5;border:1px solid #ffffff29;border-radius:999px;padding:.65rem 1rem;position:fixed;top:1rem;left:1rem;transform:translateY(-150%)}.skip-link:focus{transform:translateY(0)}.container-shell{width:min(100% - 2rem,78rem);max-width:78rem;margin-inline:auto}.surface-panel{background:#111216e0;border:1px solid #ffffff14}.site-header{z-index:40;background:#0e0f14bd;border-bottom:1px solid #ffffff0f;position:sticky;top:0}.header-inner{flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:1rem;padding-block:.95rem;display:flex}.brand-mark{align-items:center;gap:.85rem;display:inline-flex}.brand-mark-icon{color:#fff;background:#ffffff14;border-radius:.9rem;place-items:center;width:2.55rem;height:2.55rem;font-weight:700;display:grid}.brand-mark-copy{gap:.125rem;display:grid}.brand-mark-copy strong{letter-spacing:-.02em;font-size:.95rem}.brand-mark-copy small{color:var(--muted-foreground)}.primary-nav{box-sizing:border-box;flex-direction:column;order:3;gap:.5rem;width:100%;padding-top:1rem;display:none}.primary-nav.is-open{display:flex}.primary-nav a{color:#fffc;border-radius:999px;align-items:center;width:100%;padding:.75rem .95rem;transition:background-color .18s,color .18s,transform .18s;display:flex}.primary-nav a:hover,.primary-nav a:focus-visible,.primary-nav a.is-active{color:#fff;background:#ffffff14}.menu-toggle{background:#ffffff05;border:1px solid #ffffff1a;border-radius:999px;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;gap:.28rem;width:2.9rem;height:2.9rem;display:inline-flex}.menu-toggle span:not(.sr-only){background:#fff;border-radius:999px;width:1rem;height:1.5px;margin-inline:auto;transition:transform .18s,opacity .18s}.menu-toggle[aria-expanded=true] span:first-child{transform:translateY(.36rem)rotate(45deg)}.menu-toggle[aria-expanded=true] span:nth-child(2){opacity:0}.menu-toggle[aria-expanded=true] span:nth-child(3){transform:translateY(-.36rem)rotate(-45deg)}.page-shell{padding-block:1.4rem 3.5rem}.page-top-content{margin-bottom:1.4rem}.page-grid{gap:1.25rem;display:grid}.main-column,.section-block,.post-grid,.post-card,.post-card-body,.featured-showcase-layout,.featured-mini-grid,.featured-lead,.featured-mini,.sidebar-card,.tab-panels,.search-results,.sidebar-post-list,.category-list{min-width:0}.sidebar-stack{gap:1.1rem;display:grid}.sidebar{box-sizing:border-box}.sidebar-card,.post-card,.category-tile,.article-shell,.pagination,.about-story,.about-principle,.about-process,.contact-primary,.contact-detail,.contact-note{border-radius:1.5rem}.page-intro{gap:.7rem;padding:.2rem 0 .35rem;display:grid}.eyebrow{color:var(--muted-foreground);letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0 0 .5rem;font-size:.76rem;font-weight:600}.page-intro h1,.section-heading h2,.category-tile-title,.post-card-title,.article-prose h2,.about-principle h2,.about-process h2,.contact-primary h2,.contact-detail h2,.contact-note h2{letter-spacing:-.04em;margin:0;line-height:1.05}.page-intro h1{font-size:clamp(2rem,5vw,3.35rem)}.intro-copy,.section-heading p,.post-card-copy,.category-tile-copy,.sidebar-heading p,.article-prose p,.about-story-copy p,.about-principle p,.about-step-copy p,.contact-primary p,.contact-detail p,.contact-note li,.footer-block p{color:#ffffffbd}.intro-copy{max-width:46rem;margin:1rem 0 0;font-size:1rem;line-height:1.7}.breadcrumbs{color:var(--muted-foreground);flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;gap:.45rem;margin-bottom:1rem;font-size:.85rem;display:flex}.breadcrumbs svg{width:.92rem;height:.92rem;flex-shrink:0;color:#ffffff3d}.breadcrumb-item+.breadcrumb-item:before{content:"/";color:#ffffff3d;margin-right:.45rem}.section-block{margin-top:1.3rem}.section-heading{gap:.55rem;margin-bottom:1rem;display:grid}.section-heading-simple{margin-bottom:1.15rem}.section-heading-simple h2{font-size:clamp(1.5rem,3.4vw,2rem)}.section-heading p{max-width:34rem;margin:0;line-height:1.7}.featured-grid,.post-grid,.category-grid,.contact-grid,.about-layout,.about-principles,.contact-layout,.contact-detail-grid{gap:1rem;display:grid}.post-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.featured-showcase-shell{gap:1rem;display:grid}.featured-showcase-head{margin-bottom:1rem}.featured-showcase-head h2,.featured-lead-title,.featured-mini-title{letter-spacing:-.045em;margin:0;line-height:1.02}.featured-showcase-head h2{font-size:clamp(1.9rem,4vw,2.8rem)}.featured-showcase-layout,.featured-mini-grid{gap:1rem;display:grid}.featured-lead,.featured-mini{background:#ffffff06;border:1px solid #ffffff14;padding:.85rem;overflow:clip}.featured-lead{border-radius:1.6rem}.featured-mini{border-radius:1.5rem}.featured-lead-media,.featured-mini-media{display:block}.featured-lead-media img{aspect-ratio:16/10;object-fit:cover;border-radius:1.1rem;width:100%}.featured-mini-media img{aspect-ratio:16/10;object-fit:cover;border-radius:1rem;width:100%}.featured-lead-body,.featured-mini-body{gap:.8rem;padding:.95rem .2rem .2rem;display:grid}.featured-lead-title{font-size:clamp(1.9rem,4vw,3rem)}.featured-lead-copy{color:#ffffffc2;max-width:42rem;margin:0;font-size:1rem;line-height:1.75}.featured-mini-title{font-size:clamp(1.2rem,2vw,1.5rem)}.post-card{content-visibility:auto;contain-intrinsic-size:420px;transition:transform .18s,border-color .18s,background-color .18s;overflow:clip}.post-card-image-link{display:block}.post-card-image{aspect-ratio:16/10;object-fit:cover;width:100%;transition:transform .22s}.post-card-body{gap:.85rem;padding:1rem;display:grid}.post-card-title{overflow-wrap:anywhere;word-break:break-word;font-size:clamp(1.2rem,3vw,1.55rem)}.post-card-title a:hover,.post-card-title a:focus-visible{color:#ffffffeb}.post-card:hover,.post-card:focus-within{background:#14151bf0;border-color:#ffffff1f;transform:translateY(-3px)}.post-card:hover .post-card-image,.post-card:focus-within .post-card-image{transform:scale(1.015)}.post-card-copy{overflow-wrap:anywhere;margin:0;line-height:1.7}.featured-post-card .post-card-body{padding:1.15rem}.featured-post-card{height:100%}.featured-post-card .post-card-image{aspect-ratio:16/11}.featured-post-card .post-card-title{font-size:clamp(1.35rem,3vw,1.8rem)}.post-card-compact .post-card-title{font-size:1.2rem}.post-meta{color:var(--muted-foreground);flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;gap:.45rem;font-size:.82rem;display:flex}.tag-row{flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.55rem;min-width:0;display:flex}.tag-chip{color:#ffffffc7;overflow-wrap:anywhere;border:1px solid #ffffff1a;border-radius:999px;align-items:center;max-width:100%;min-height:2rem;padding-inline:.8rem;font-size:.8rem;transition:background-color .18s,border-color .18s;display:inline-flex}.tag-chip:hover,.tag-chip:focus-visible{background:#ffffff0f;border-color:#ffffff2e}.sidebar-card{content-visibility:auto;contain-intrinsic-size:260px;background:#121318eb;padding:1rem}.sidebar-heading{border-bottom:1px solid #ffffff0f;gap:.35rem;margin-bottom:.85rem;padding-bottom:.75rem;display:grid}.sidebar-heading h2{margin:0;font-size:1rem}.sidebar-heading p{margin:.4rem 0 0;font-size:.92rem;line-height:1.6}.search-shell{background:#ffffff06;border:1px solid #ffffff14;border-radius:1.1rem;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;min-height:3.35rem;padding:.35rem .9rem;transition:border-color .18s,background-color .18s;display:flex}.search-shell:focus-within{background:#ffffff0a;border-color:#ffffff24}.search-shell input{color:#fff;background:0 0;border:0;width:100%;min-width:0;padding-block:.55rem}.search-shell input::placeholder{color:#ffffff6b}.icon{width:1rem;height:1rem;color:var(--muted-foreground);flex-shrink:0}.search-results{gap:.5rem;margin:.75rem 0 0;padding:0;list-style:none;display:grid}.search-results a,.sidebar-post-list a,.category-list a{background:#ffffff06;border:1px solid #ffffff0d;border-radius:1rem;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:.75rem;padding:.8rem .9rem;transition:background-color .18s,border-color .18s,transform .18s;display:flex}.search-results a:hover,.search-results a:focus-visible,.sidebar-post-list a:hover,.sidebar-post-list a:focus-visible,.category-list a:hover,.category-list a:focus-visible,.category-list a.is-current{background:#ffffff0d;border-color:#ffffff17}.search-results span,.sidebar-post-list span,.category-list span{overflow-wrap:anywhere;color:#ffffffe6;min-width:0;line-height:1.45}.search-empty{color:var(--muted-foreground);padding:.8rem .9rem;display:block}.search-results small,.sidebar-post-list small,.category-list strong{color:var(--muted-foreground);white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0;padding-top:.1rem}.tab-list{background:#ffffff05;border:1px solid #ffffff14;border-radius:1.1rem;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:.55rem;width:100%;padding:.35rem;display:grid}.tab-button{color:#ffffffad;background:0 0;border:1px solid #0000;border-radius:.9rem;min-height:2.7rem;font-size:.92rem;font-weight:600;transition:border-color .18s,background-color .18s,color .18s}.tab-button:hover,.tab-button:focus-visible{color:#fff;border-color:#ffffff14}.tab-button.is-active{color:#fff;background:#ffffff12;border-color:#ffffff1a}.tab-panels{margin-top:.85rem}.sidebar-post-list,.category-list,.footer-links{gap:.55rem;margin:0;padding:0;list-style:none;display:grid}.category-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.category-tile,.about-story,.about-principle,.about-process,.contact-primary,.contact-detail,.contact-note{content-visibility:auto;contain-intrinsic-size:220px;padding:1.15rem}.category-tile-top,.category-tile-footer{justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:1rem;display:flex}.category-tile-title{margin-top:1rem;font-size:clamp(1.45rem,4vw,2rem)}.category-count{color:var(--muted-foreground);font-size:.88rem}.category-tile-copy{margin:.85rem 0 1rem;line-height:1.7}.category-tile-footer{color:var(--muted-foreground);border-top:1px solid #ffffff14;padding-top:1rem;font-size:.92rem}.category-tile-footer a{color:#fff}.pagination{flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;margin-top:1.75rem;padding:1rem;display:flex}.pagination-label{color:var(--muted-foreground);font-size:.88rem}.pagination-links{gap:.5rem;display:flex}.pagination-link{border:1px solid #ffffff1a;border-radius:999px;justify-content:center;align-items:center;width:2.4rem;height:2.4rem;display:inline-flex}.pagination-link.is-active,.pagination-link:hover,.pagination-link:focus-visible{background:#ffffff14}.article-shell{overflow:clip}.article-title-block{text-align:center;padding:1.4rem 1rem 1.15rem}.article-title-inner{gap:.95rem;max-width:52rem;margin-inline:auto;display:grid}.article-title-block .tag-row,.article-title-block .post-meta{justify-content:center}.article-title-block .post-meta{font-size:.84rem}.article-title-block h1{letter-spacing:-.045em;margin:0;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4.2vw,2.95rem);line-height:1.02}.article-hero img{aspect-ratio:16/9;object-fit:cover;width:100%}.article-prose{padding-inline:1rem;padding-top:1rem;padding-bottom:1.25rem}.article-prose .lead{color:#ffffffd1;margin-top:0;font-size:1.08rem}.article-prose h2{margin-top:2rem;font-size:clamp(1.5rem,4vw,2rem)}.article-prose p,.article-prose li,.article-prose blockquote{font-size:1rem;line-height:1.85}.article-prose ul{margin:1rem 0 0;padding-left:1.15rem}.article-prose blockquote{color:#ffffffe0;border-left:3px solid #ffffff24;margin:1.5rem 0;padding-left:1rem}.site-footer{background:#0c0d11b8;border-top:1px solid #ffffff14}.footer-grid{gap:1.35rem;padding-block:2rem;display:grid}.footer-block h2{color:#fff;letter-spacing:-.02em;margin:0 0 1rem;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700}.footer-block p{max-width:22rem;margin:.85rem 0 0;line-height:1.7}.brand-mark-footer{margin-bottom:.5rem}.reveal{opacity:1!important;transform:none!important}.reveal.is-visible{opacity:1!important;transform:none!important}@media(max-width:1023px){.primary-nav,.sidebar{width:auto;margin-inline:-1rem;padding-inline:1rem}.sidebar{margin-top:1.6rem}}@media(min-width:768px){.featured-mini-grid,.post-grid,.category-grid,.footer-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}.article-prose{padding-inline:1.4rem}.page-intro{padding-top:.35rem}.article-title-block{padding-inline:1.4rem;padding-top:1.65rem;padding-bottom:1.3rem}}@media(min-width:1024px){.header-inner{flex-wrap:nowrap;align-items:center}.menu-toggle{display:none}.primary-nav{flex-direction:row;justify-content:flex-end;align-items:center;gap:.35rem;width:auto;margin-left:auto;padding-top:0;display:flex}.primary-nav a{white-space:nowrap;width:auto;min-height:2.7rem;padding:.7rem 1rem;display:inline-flex}.page-shell{padding-block:2rem 4.5rem}.page-grid{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 21rem;align-items:start}.featured-showcase-shell{gap:1.2rem}.featured-showcase-layout{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.3fr) minmax(20rem,.8fr);align-items:stretch}.featured-lead{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.15fr) minmax(18rem,.85fr);min-height:31rem;display:grid}.featured-lead-media img{aspect-ratio:auto;height:100%}.featured-lead-body{align-content:end;padding:.4rem .4rem .4rem 1.2rem}.featured-mini-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.featured-mini{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(16rem,.95fr);display:grid}.featured-mini-media img{aspect-ratio:auto;height:100%}.featured-mini-body{align-content:center;padding:.4rem .4rem .4rem 1rem}.sidebar{margin-top:1rem;position:sticky;top:7rem}.post-grid,.category-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}.related-posts-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr))}.footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1.2fr 1fr 1fr}}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){html{scroll-behavior:auto}*,:before,:after{scroll-behavior:auto!important;transition-duration:.01ms!important;animation-duration:.01ms!important;animation-iteration-count:1!important}.reveal{opacity:1!important;transform:none!important}} Icerige gec 0 320 false false BEHIND 0 • Menuyu ac Ana sayfa Kategoriler true true true false false false false false Kategori Arama Arama sonuclari Arsiv Yayin Ana sayfa Ana sayfa ← Onceki post Sonraki post → Sayfalar ‹ • › Ara 5 false false LAST_WEEK ALPHA LIST ALL true

Performans, okunabilirlik ve SEO odakli yayin tasarimi notlari.

Bu alani Layout ekranindan duzenleyebilirsin.

•
  • Ana sayfa
  • Arama
  • Kategoriler
  • hello@example.com
  • +90 000 000 00 00
  • Istanbul, Turkiye
404 Sayfa bulunamadi Istegin mevcut tema akisi icinde karsilik bulamadi. Ana sayfaya donup yayina devam edebilirsin. Ana sayfaya don // (function() { var header = document.querySelector('.site-header'); if (!header) { return; } var lastY = window.scrollY || window.pageYOffset || 0; var ticking = false; function updateHeaderState() { ticking = false; var currentY = window.scrollY || window.pageYOffset || 0; var panel = document.querySelector('[data-menu-panel]'); var menuOpen = !!(panel && panel.classList.contains('is-open')); header.classList.toggle('is-scrolled', currentY > 12); if (menuOpen || currentY < 16) { header.classList.remove('is-hidden'); header.classList.add('is-pinned'); lastY = currentY; return; } var delta = currentY - lastY; if (delta > 6 && currentY > 96) { header.classList.add('is-hidden'); header.classList.remove('is-pinned'); } else if (delta < -6) { header.classList.remove('is-hidden'); header.classList.add('is-pinned'); } lastY = currentY; } function requestHeaderUpdate() { if (ticking) { return; } ticking = true; window.requestAnimationFrame(updateHeaderState); } header.classList.add('is-pinned'); updateHeaderState(); window.addEventListener('scroll', requestHeaderUpdate, {passive: true}); window.addEventListener('resize', requestHeaderUpdate); })(); (function() { var doc = document; var toggle = doc.querySelector('[data-menu-toggle]'); var panel = doc.querySelector('[data-menu-panel]'); var navLinks = panel ? panel.querySelectorAll('a[href]') : []; if (!toggle || !panel) { return; } function normalizePath(url) { try { var parsed = new URL(url, window.location.href); var path = parsed.pathname.replace(/\/+$/, '') || '/'; return path; } catch (error) { return url; } } var currentPath = normalizePath(window.location.href); for (var i = 0; i < navLinks.length; i += 1) { var link = navLinks[i]; if (normalizePath(link.href) === currentPath) { link.classList.add('is-active'); if (!link.hasAttribute('aria-current')) { link.setAttribute('aria-current', 'page'); } } } function closeMenu() { toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false'); panel.classList.remove('is-open'); } toggle.addEventListener('click', function() { var expanded = toggle.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true'; toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(!expanded)); panel.classList.toggle('is-open', !expanded); }); panel.addEventListener('click', function(event) { if (event.target && event.target.tagName === 'A') { closeMenu(); } }); window.addEventListener('resize', function() { if (window.innerWidth >= 1024) { closeMenu(); } }); })(); (function() { var hero = document.querySelector('.article-hero img[data-featured-image]'); var prose = document.querySelector('.article-prose'); if (!hero || !prose || document.body.getAttribute('data-page-type') !== 'item') { return; } function normalizeImageUrl(url) { if (!url) { return ''; } try { var parsed = new URL(url, window.location.href); var parts = parsed.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean).filter(function(part) { return !/^(s|w)\d+.*$/i.test(part); }); return parsed.hostname + '/' + parts.slice(-2).join('/'); } catch (error) { return url.split('?')[0].split('#')[0]; } } function removableContainer(node) { var container = node.closest('figure,.separator,p,div'); if (!container || container === prose) { return node; } var text = (container.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ''); var mediaCount = container.querySelectorAll('img,video,iframe,picture').length; if (!text || mediaCount === 1) { return container; } return node; } var heroKey = normalizeImageUrl(hero.currentSrc || hero.src); if (!heroKey) { return; } var bodyImages = prose.querySelectorAll('img'); for (var i = 0; i < bodyImages.length; i += 1) { var image = bodyImages[i]; var imageKey = normalizeImageUrl(image.currentSrc || image.src); if (imageKey && imageKey === heroKey) { removableContainer(image).remove(); break; } } })(); //
